subject: Gaming
title: Genshin Impact: Free-to-Play RPG Empire
description: Learn Genshin Impact: Free-to-Play RPG Empire in one minute.

hook.text: Genshin Impact earned $4 billion in two years. It's free to download. The business model is the product.

buildup.text: Chinese studio miHoYo built a Zelda-like open world with anime aesthetics and gacha monetization.

discovery.text: Gacha mechanics—random character pulls for real money—generated enormous revenue from dedicated fans.

twist.text: Western critics called it exploitative. Asian markets embraced it. Cultural attitudes split sharply.

climax.text: Genshin proved that free-to-play RPGs from China could compete with—and outperform—traditional studios.

punchline.text: Free to play, four billion earned. Gacha changed the RPG business.

quiz.question: How does Genshin Impact generate revenue?
options: Gacha mechanics where players pay for random character pulls
